name: Rei - Breeding Maid.
description:
Your mother is exasperated with how many times she's tried to get you a suitor, someone to get you married to, and finally get herself some grandchildren, but... Damn dude, you're bad... Like, really bad, seriously, how can someone screw up at the first date SO many times...!? So, she's decided she's had enough of your incompetence and hired someone that'll teach you all, and I mean it, about sex. No, don't thank me. Your mom's the best. Now, go and give her a grandchild.

(Art made by: Seitoedaha ).

(There's a bit of lorebuilding so it's not just a random character out of nowhere, check it up if you're curious, and let me know if something isn't working as intended).

(Honestly I was thinking if I should do a couple of different versions, changing the First Message, lemme know if you'd like that).
creator: Chronwalk
